lowering.protocol_semantics: CellScript IR records consume/read_ref/create summaries before RISC-V codegen
lowering.assembly_path: riscv64-asm emits executable CKB-style syscall paths plus metadata for verifier obligations
lowering.elf_path: riscv64-elf is always enabled; all operations have real RISC-V lowerings or fail-closed traps with specific error codes
lowering.semantics_preserving_claim: Pure computation lowering is executable; stateful protocol lowering is represented in metadata and asm but is not yet a proved schema decoder/verifier

runtime.syscall_abi: CKB store_data ABI: A0=buffer, A1=size pointer, A2=offset, A3=index, A4=source

vm_abi.scope: CKB-style full object load syscalls: LOAD_SCRIPT, LOAD_INPUT, LOAD_CELL, LOAD_HEADER
vm_abi.selection: Compiler artifact metadata declares the required VM object ABI; verifier callers must pass this ABI to the runtime

runtime.pure_elf_runner: cellc run --features vm-runner executes no-argument pure ELF with ckb-vm 0.24

runtime_errors.name: syscall-failed
runtime_errors.description: A target VM syscall returned a non-zero status while loading transaction context.
runtime_errors.hint: Check transaction input/output/cell_dep indexes, source flags, and target-profile syscall compatibility.

runtime_errors.name: bounds-check-failed
runtime_errors.description: Loaded bytes were smaller than the verifier-required minimum.
runtime_errors.hint: Check witness or cell data length against the schema manifest and entry ABI report.

runtime_errors.name: cell-load-failed
runtime_errors.description: Cell data or field loading failed or returned an unusable result.
runtime_errors.hint: Check that the expected input, output, or dep cell exists and is reachable by the generated script.

runtime_errors.name: exact-size-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: Loaded bytes did not match the exact fixed-size schema requirement.
runtime_errors.hint: Check fixed-width schema fields and ensure the builder encodes the exact Molecule byte length.

runtime_errors.name: assertion-failed
runtime_errors.description: A source-level assert or invariant check evaluated to false.
runtime_errors.hint: Inspect the action invariant or assert expression and the transaction values that feed it.

runtime_errors.name: flow-transition-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: A flow transition did not match the declared transition rule.
runtime_errors.hint: Compare consumed and produced state fields with the declared flow transitions.

runtime_errors.name: flow-new-state-invalid
runtime_errors.description: A created or proposed output state value was outside the declared state range.
runtime_errors.hint: Check created output state values and declared flow states.

runtime_errors.name: flow-old-state-invalid
runtime_errors.description: A consumed state value was outside the declared state range.
runtime_errors.hint: Check consumed input state values and declared flow states.

runtime_errors.name: entry-witness-magic-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: Entry witness bytes did not start with the CellScript witness ABI magic.
runtime_errors.hint: Encode entry witnesses with cellc entry-witness or the documented CSARGv1 wire format.

runtime_errors.name: type-hash-preservation-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: A proposed output did not preserve the consumed input type hash.
runtime_errors.hint: Check the proposed output type script and builder output ordering.

runtime_errors.name: lock-hash-preservation-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: A proposed output did not preserve the consumed input lock hash.
runtime_errors.hint: Check the proposed output lock script and builder output ordering.

runtime_errors.name: field-preservation-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: An output field required to be preserved differs from its input field.
runtime_errors.hint: Check proposed output fields that should preserve lock/type/data identity.

runtime_errors.name: mutate-transition-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: A proposed output failed its declared field transition check.
runtime_errors.hint: Check the mutable field delta against the documented transition formula.

runtime_errors.name: data-preservation-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: Proposed output data outside transition ranges differs from the input data.
runtime_errors.hint: Check that non-transition output data bytes are copied from the consumed input.

runtime_errors.name: dynamic-field-bounds-invalid
runtime_errors.description: A Molecule dynamic field offset or length failed bounds validation.
runtime_errors.hint: Validate Molecule table offsets, field count, and dynamic field lengths.

runtime_errors.name: type-hash-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: A loaded cell type hash did not match the expected CellScript type identity.
runtime_errors.hint: Check type script hash/hash_type/args and the expected CellScript type identity.

runtime_errors.name: fixed-byte-comparison-unresolved
runtime_errors.description: A fixed-byte verifier comparison could not resolve its trusted source bytes.
runtime_errors.hint: Use schema-backed parameters or fixed-byte values that the verifier can address.

runtime_errors.name: numeric-or-discriminant-invalid
runtime_errors.description: A numeric verifier check, enum discriminant, or arithmetic guard failed.
runtime_errors.hint: Check enum tags, arithmetic bounds, and generated collection length arithmetic.

runtime_errors.name: collection-bounds-invalid
runtime_errors.description: A runtime collection index, length, or capacity check failed.
runtime_errors.hint: Check collection length, index, and capacity values in witness or cell data.

runtime_errors.name: consume-invalid-operand
runtime_errors.description: A consume operation reached codegen with an invalid or unsupported operand.
runtime_errors.hint: This indicates an unsupported lowering path; inspect compiler metadata blockers.

runtime_errors.name: destroy-invalid-operand
runtime_errors.description: A destroy operation reached codegen with an invalid or unsupported operand.
runtime_errors.hint: This indicates an unsupported lowering path; inspect compiler metadata blockers.

runtime_errors.name: collection-runtime-unsupported
runtime_errors.description: A runtime collection helper shape is not supported by the current backend.
runtime_errors.hint: Avoid advertising this collection helper as production-ready until support is implemented.

runtime_errors.name: entry-witness-abi-invalid
runtime_errors.description: Entry witness payload layout, width, or parameter ABI placement was invalid.
runtime_errors.hint: Inspect cellc constraints or cellc abi output for parameter slots and witness byte layout.

runtime_errors.name: capacity-preservation-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: A proposed output did not preserve the consumed input capacity.
runtime_errors.hint: Check the proposed output capacity and builder output ordering.

runtime_errors.name: dynamic-field-value-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: A dynamic Molecule field value did not match the expected verifier source.
runtime_errors.hint: Check dynamic Molecule field encoding and the value source used by the verifier.

runtime_errors.name: out-point-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: A loaded input OutPoint field did not match the expected transaction lineage.
runtime_errors.hint: Check the input OutPoint tx hash/index and the expected lineage binding.

runtime_errors.name: script-field-malformed
runtime_errors.description: A loaded CKB Script field did not match the expected Molecule Script layout.
runtime_errors.hint: Check the lock/type Script Molecule encoding, args length, and whether the cell actually has that script field.

runtime_errors.name: dao-header-lineage-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: The DAO field loaded from an input's committed block header did not match the supplied HeaderDep.
runtime_errors.hint: Bind the HeaderDep to the exact input/deposit header used for DAO accumulated-rate accounting.

runtime_errors.name: dao-maturity-violation
runtime_errors.description: The DAO input since value was below the required maturity lower bound.
runtime_errors.hint: Check the withdrawal request since value and ensure the consumed DAO input has reached the required maturity.

runtime_errors.name: ckb-since-malformed
runtime_errors.description: A CKB since value or requested since constructor argument was malformed.
runtime_errors.hint: Check since flags, metric type, epoch number/index/length bounds, and index < length.

runtime_errors.name: script-args-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: A loaded CKB Script args field did not match the expected args policy.
runtime_errors.hint: Check lock/type script args and whether this protocol path requires empty script args.

runtime_errors.name: metapoint-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: A loaded CKB MetaPoint relation did not match the expected input/output index and relative distance.
runtime_errors.hint: Check the paired input OutPoints or output indexes and the signed relative-distance field.

runtime_errors.name: metapoint-cardinality-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: A current-script lock/type MetaPoint pair scan found a duplicate, missing, or unbalanced relation.
runtime_errors.hint: Check current-script lock-only/type-only cell counts and ensure every MetaPoint has exactly one paired cell.

runtime_errors.name: script-identity-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: A loaded CKB Script code_hash or hash_type did not match the expected identity.
runtime_errors.hint: Check Script code_hash, hash_type, deployed dep, and whether lock/type role is correct.

runtime_errors.name: witness-malformed
runtime_errors.description: Loaded witness bytes did not match the expected Molecule WitnessArgs layout or ABI magic.
runtime_errors.hint: Check witness byte layout, WitnessArgs table header, and entry ABI magic bytes.

runtime_errors.name: witness-field-truncated
runtime_errors.description: A WitnessArgs field offset or length exceeded the loaded witness byte range.
runtime_errors.hint: Check that expected WitnessArgs field offsets plus field lengths stay within loaded witness size.

runtime_errors.name: ckb-source-view-invalid
runtime_errors.description: A CKB SourceView value was malformed or used with an incompatible source-specific helper.
runtime_errors.hint: Pass a SourceView produced by the matching source::* helper and keep indexes in range.

runtime_errors.name: header-dep-missing
runtime_errors.description: A required HeaderDep source view was absent or could not be bound to the requested header.
runtime_errors.hint: Add the required header dep and bind it to the input/deposit whose DAO data is read.

runtime_errors.name: dao-field-malformed
runtime_errors.description: A loaded DAO header or cell field did not match the expected encoded layout.
runtime_errors.hint: Check DAO header bytes, accumulated-rate width, and deposit/withdrawal cell data layout.

runtime_errors.name: script-role-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: The script was used in a lock/type role that violates the declared invariant.
runtime_errors.hint: Check whether the script is deployed and invoked as the expected lock or type script.

runtime_errors.name: xudt-binding-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: An xUDT type args, owner-mode, or amount binding check failed.
runtime_errors.hint: Check xUDT type args, owner-mode flags, input type hash, and token data layout.

runtime_errors.name: aggregate-amount-mismatch
runtime_errors.description: A lowered aggregate/C256 accounting equality or inequality check failed.
runtime_errors.hint: Compare generated aggregate inputs/outputs and inspect overflow or exact-equality assumptions.

ckb.hash_type_policy_surface: compiler-declared-type-id-hash-type; builder must preserve script hash_type in deployed cells

warnings: CKB cycles and transaction size are not measured by the compiler; require builder dry-run for production
CKB output capacity planning is required for this artifact (create outputs=2, mutate outputs=0); full transaction-level capacity remains builder/runtime-managed

molecule_schema.name: NovaSealCellV0
OutPoint
NovaSealCellCommitmentV0
NovaSealIntentCoreV0
NovaSealSignedIntentV0
SignaturePayload
ProofReceiptCommitmentV0
ProofReceiptV0
molecule_schema.schema:
array CellScriptUint32 [byte; 4];
array CellScriptUint64 [byte; 8];
array CellScriptHash [byte; 32];

struct OutPoint {
    tx_hash: CellScriptHash,
    index: CellScriptUint32,
}

struct ProofReceiptV0 {
    protocol_id: CellScriptHash,
    package_hash: CellScriptHash,
    policy_hash: CellScriptHash,
    action: byte,
    terminal_path: byte,
    old_cell: OutPoint,
    new_cell_commitment: CellScriptHash,
    old_state_hash: CellScriptHash,
    new_state_hash: CellScriptHash,
    old_nonce: CellScriptUint64,
    new_nonce: CellScriptUint64,
    intent_core_hash: CellScriptHash,
    signed_intent_hash: CellScriptHash,
    payout_commitment_hash: CellScriptHash,
    signer_authority_hash: CellScriptHash,
    expiry: CellScriptUint64,
}
